_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the development of Intelligence Needs (INs), Intelligence Requirements (IRs), and Essential Elements of Information (EEI).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI regulatory requirements, including the EU AI Act prohibited use categories, high-risk system obligations, conformity assessment requirements, and technical documentation standards.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-008 (LS, cosine: 0.548), AG-K-008 (AG, cosine: 0.535).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.521). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, requirements]. DCWF-only terms [development, eei, elements, essential, information, ins] vs WIDAI-only terms [act, ai, assessment, categories, conformity, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.842 (P=0.835, R=0.848). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:66.2%, C:33.8%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of the development of Intelligence Needs (INs), Intelligence Requireme" vs "Knowledge of AI regulatory requirements, including the EU AI Act prohibited use" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.562 ≈ STS 0.521 (gap 0.041). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, requirements] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, requirements]. DCWF-only: [development, eei, elements, essential, information, ins]. WIDAI-only: [act, ai, assessment, categories, conformity, documentation].

signals.detail: STS 0.521 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
